data.title: Ancient ETH whales have completed liquidation, selling a total of 9,095 ETH in three years and cashing out a total of $12.5 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, an address completed the final 2024 ETH liquidation transaction, worth about $2.96 million, ending its 2.4-year silence. Data shows that the address has sold a total of 9095 ETH in three years, with an average selling price of $1,375, and a total cash out of about $12.5 million. On-chain records show that the address can be traced back to the withdrawal behavior of Kraken and Bitfinex 10 years ago.

data.title: DWF Labs Opens Applications for $250 Million Liquidity Fund
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DWF Labs announced that its $250 million Liquid Fund is now open for applications. The fund will provide strategic funding and ecological support for medium and large market value token projects, aiming to promote the real application and sustainable development of the crypto industry. DWF Labs said that the fund will help projects achieve long-term growth and enhance ecological vitality.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market saw liquidations totaling $478 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $130 million of the liquidations, while short positions amounted to $348 million. Bitcoin liquidations reached $180 million, and Ethereum liquidations totaled $136 million.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Binance Completes Babylon BTC Staking Airdrop Distribution With 12% Bonus Rewards
data.description:
Binance has officially concluded its Babylon BTC Staking campaign on Binance Earn's On-Chain Yields, announcing the distribution of BABY token airdrop rewards and a 12% bonus reward for eligible users. Key Highlights:Babylon Points Program Ended: As per the Babylon project, the staking points program concluded on April 2, 2025 (UTC). No new points have accrued since that date. BABY Airdrop Rewards Distributed: Users who participated in BTC staking via Binance will receive BABY tokens in their Spot Accounts starting April 10, 2025 (UTC)
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/22718061999162?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Why Crypto Market Is Up Today: Trump’s Tariff Pause Sends Bitcoin to $82K
data.description:
In a sudden policy flip, Trump paused the global tariff war for 90 days, sending shockwaves through financial markets. Cryptocurrencies responded fast, with major coins like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP all soaring. As Trump announced a 90-day suspension of the tariff war with most …
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/why-crypto-market-is-up-today-trumps-tariff-pause-sends-bitcoin-to-82k/

data.title: OpenSea Urges SEC to Clarify NFT Platform Regulations
data.description:
According to PANews, OpenSea has reached out to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to request clarification on the regulatory status of NFT platforms. The company argues that NFT platforms should not be classified as securities exchanges or brokers. This follows the SEC's decision in February to terminate its investigation into OpenSea for potential securities law violations.

OpenSea emphasized that it does not facilitate transactions or hold assets, but rather serves as a platform for buyers and sellers to discover and connect. The company believes that categorizing NFT platforms as securities platforms would be an overreach of regulatory authority. Additionally, the letter from OpenSea requests that the SEC exempt NFT platforms from proposed broker-dealer rules.

data.title: Senate Confirms Paul Atkins to Lead SEC Under Trump Administration
data.description:
Paul Atkins was confirmed Wednesday as SEC chair in a 52–44 Senate vote, giving him authority to lead US financial market oversight under the Trump administration.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/paul-atkins-wins-senate-nod-sec-chair-role-under-trump-administration/

data.title: Binance Completes Babylon BTC Staking Airdrop Distribution With 12% Bonus Rewards
data.description: Binance has officially concluded its Babylon BTC Staking campaign on Binance Earn's On-Chain Yields, announcing the distribution of BABY token airdrop rewards and a 12% bonus reward for eligible users.Key Highlights:Babylon Points Program Ended: As per the Babylon project, the staking points program concluded on April 2, 2025 (UTC). No new points have accrued since that date.BABY Airdrop Rewards Distributed: Users who participated in BTC staking via Binance will receive BABY tokens in their Spot Accounts starting April 10, 2025 (UTC).Extra 12% Bonus Airdrop: Binance is rewarding users with an additional 12% in BABY tokens, calculated based on total points earned. This bonus is exclusive to BTC staking participants via Binance.BTC Redemption Details:Users can manually redeem their staked BTC anytime via:[Assets] > [Earn] > [Staking] > [On-Chain Yields Flexible]Manual redemptions will return BTC to Spot Wallets within 3 days.If users don’t act, Binance will automatically return all staked BTC by April 15, 2025 (UTC).How Binance On-Chain Yields Works:Binance On-Chain Yields offers direct access to decentralized earning opportunities, helping users participate in on-chain staking, token farming, and points programs—all without needing complex DeFi setups.This initiative enhances user engagement in projects like Babylon (BABY), which focuses on self-custodial BTC staking to enhance the security of proof-of-stake blockchains.For real-time updates and further staking opportunities, users are encouraged to check the Binance Earn > On-Chain Yields section regularly.
